'''Barabel''' was the native tongue of the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Species/Legends|species]], spoken on their native [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]]. Barabel language included mainly barks and hisses which were harsh-sounding. Barabels could speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] but they were not prone to learn it, unless they needed it. Most Barabels leaving Barab I made an extra effort to learn Basic or another, more widely used language.

{{Language-stub}}
